---
title: "housing_model"
author: "Sarai Saenz & Sofia Hernandez"
date: "2026-04-15"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, echo = TRUE)
```

## Setup

This is where we will add all our dependencies.

```{r}
library(mlbench)
library(AppliedPredictiveModeling)
library(caret)
library(randomForest)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(gridExtra)
library(patchwork)
library(partykit)
library(Cubist)
library(gbm)
```

## Preprocessing

The Housing dataset contains many missing values and categroical variables. Our main task involves imputing or dropping missing values, encoding categroicals

```{r}

```
